core_mechanism: an entropic excluded-volume (depletion) force generated by a bath of inert background particles, producing an effective compacting attraction on a fluctuating object whose strength is continuously tuned by the background volume fraction, thereby shifting the thresholds of its control-parameter-driven order-disorder transitions
brief_reason: The abstract attributes chain compaction and the downward shift of transition temperatures between distinct ordered states to the volume fraction and size of inert crowding particles, which is the signature of a depletion/excluded-volume entropic force renormalizing transition thresholds.
